title: Advanced FPS Counter
author: TunaDev
description: A lightweight UI script that tracks and displays the frames per second in real-time.
code:
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local fpsLabel = script.Parent
RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(function(step)
	local fps = math.floor(1 / step)
	fpsLabel.Text = "FPS: " .. fps
end)

title: Smooth Day/Night Cycle
author: SolarFlare
description: Automatically cycles the game lighting time of day smoothly.
code:
local Lighting = game:GetService("Lighting")
local cycleSpeed = 0.1
while true do
	Lighting.ClockTime = Lighting.ClockTime + cycleSpeed
	task.wait(0.5)
end

title: Simple Auto-Sprint
author: SpeedyG
description: Increases player walk speed while holding the Left Shift key.
code:
local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
UIS.InputBegan:Connect(function(input)
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift then
		player.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 24
	end
end)
UIS.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
	if input.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift then
		player.Character.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 16
	end
end)
